name: Wine Marinated Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Burgundy or Other Red Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim the mushrooms.
2. Shape the meat into 24 balls. Place in a glass bowl or plastic bag. Add the mushrooms. Mix the remaining ingredients together and pour over the meatballs and mushrooms. Cover and refrigerate for at least 8 hours, turning the meatballs and mushrooms occasionally.
3. On each of 4 12-inch metal skewers, alternate 6 meatballs with 6 mushrooms.
4. Set oven control to broil and/or preheat to 550°F (or highest setting).
5. Broil kabobs 4 inches from the heat until they reach the desired doneness, about 15 to 20 minutes. Brush occasionally with the remaining marinade and gently push with a fork to turn.
